recommendations.title: The Parisian Bitch
recommendations.overview: Thirty-year-old Camilla, realizes that she doesn't have the life she deserves and decides that the only destiny worthy of her is that of a royal princess.

recommendations.title: I Kissed a Girl
recommendations.overview: Jérémie, 34, wakes up in an apartment he doesn't know, next to a woman he doesn't know. She is Adna, a stunning Swedish woman who is as funny as she is sweet. Is this the beginning of a fairy tale? Not quite, since Jérémie is about to get married—to

recommendations.title: The ABCs of Love
recommendations.overview: Thirty-year old adulteen Vincent babysits animals and children for a living, and his latest job is 9-year old Bart, who just moved into the building with his overworked and single mom.  At his new school, Bart is anxious to develop a cool reputation,

recommendations.title: Two Is a Family
recommendations.overview: A man without attachments or responsibilities suddenly finds himself with an abandoned baby and leaves for London to try and find the mother. Eight years later after he and his daughter become inseparable Gloria's mother reappears.

recommendations.title: Seriously Single
recommendations.overview: While her free-living bestie urges her to embrace singlehood, a commitment-craving social media expert can't stop following the life of a former love.

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: Ernest & Celestine
recommendations.overview: Celestine is a little mouse trying to avoid a dental career while Ernest is a big bear craving an artistic outlet. When Celestine meets Ernest, they overcome their natural enmity by forging a life of crime together.
recommendations.director: Vincent Patar, Benjamin Renner, Stéphane Aubier

recommendations.title: Onibaba
recommendations.overview: While her son, Kichi, is away at war, a woman and her daughter-in-law survive by killing samurai who stray into their swamp, then selling whatever valuables they find. Both are devastated when they learn that Kichi has died, but his wife soon begins

recommendations.title: The Front Room
recommendations.overview: Everything goes to hell for newly-pregnant Belinda after her mother-in-law moves in. As the diabolical guest tries to get her claws on the child, Belinda must draw the line somewhere.

recommendations.title: Moscow Does Not Believe in Tears
